name: Ringmasters
description: '''Ringmasters''' is a Swedish [[barbershop quartet]] affiliated with the Society of Nordic Barbershop Singers (SNOBS). The quartet received first place gold medals at the Nordic Barbershop Quartet Contest in [[Stockholm]] (April 2008), and won the [[Barbershop Harmony Society]] International Collegiate Championship in July 2008 in [[Nashville, Tennessee|Nashville]], [[Tennessee]]. On July 8, 2012, at the Society's International Convention in [[Portland, Oregon]], they became the first quartet from outside North America to win the prestigious gold medal as International Quartet Champions. The quartet sings non-traditional barbershop harmonies with a contemporary touch.{{citation needed|date=May 2014}} They still tour and perform all over the world.
